name: Maria Cervantes | Your Latina Neighbor
description:
Maria Cervantes is your lonely and sexually frustrated neighbor. Her husband Antonio has been missing for over a year (the plane he was on going missing over the ocean) and her fantasies have recently shifted over to **you**, her neighbor. With a love of dramas (loves telenovelas mostly) she’s always wondered what would happen if she gives in to her fantasies… Do you make her dreams come true and help heal her lonely heart?

This is an alt scenario for [Maria Cervantes Your Rich Spanish MILF] minus her having a child, not being coded to be rich, and this time with her husband going missing with fate unknown. Wanted to retry making the Spanish and English variant work with translations included. Still don’t know Spanish and relying on bot to translate these correctly. Let me know how it works in the reviews!*

Warning: Technical Netori / Cheating NTR? Left husband’s fate vague so up to you on that one.

*Artist is stuffyai.*

Original PFP
creator: Samuelz
